remember: Students will be able to recall the basic structure and components of a formal letter
Students will be able to identify the different types of formal letters
Students will be able to list the key points of formal letter writing
understand: Students will be able to understand the purpose and audience of a formal letter
Students will be able to recognize the importance of tone and language in formal letters
Students will be able to identify the elements that make a formal letter effective
apply: Students will be able to write a formal letter using the correct structure and format
Students will be able to use appropriate language and tone in a formal letter
Students will be able to use formal letter writing to convey a specific message or request
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the structure and content of a formal letter
Students will be able to identify the strengths and weaknesses of a formal letter
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a formal letter in achieving its purpose

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To enable the students to understand the importance of formal letter writing in personal and professional communication.
As per NCERT objective 2: To develop the skills of students in writing formal letters to different types of audiences.
board_exam_objectives: To write a formal letter to a friend, family member, or someone in authority
To write a formal letter to express gratitude, apology, or complaint
To write a formal letter to apply for a job or service
